calendar.matters:
Petition Re: Waiver Of Bond Pursuant To Consent By All Beneficiaries
Off Calendar Oct-25-2023 Granted Per Written Order

Beneficiary'S Petition To Remove The Trustee And Order Instructions Pursuant To Probate Code 17200
Off Calendar Jun-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Jong Lee appearing via zoom for Chong Tai Kim (Petitioner).

No objections by Mr. Lee. The beneficiary's petition to remove the trustee and order instructions etc., and Petition for appointment of successor trustee are taken under submission with the intent to grant. The order to show cause is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt; Deputy: Choi: Not reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Jun-13-2023 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2023 Off Calendar

Beneficiary'S Petition To Remove The Trustee And Order Instructions Pursuant To Probate Code 17200
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Continued To Jun-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jong K. Lee, esq., via Zoom, for Chong Tai Kim, Petitioner.

At the court's query, Mr. Lee advises that he has no new information since the last calling. The court advises that this matter will need to be continued to allow Mr. Lee to remedy the procedural issue regarding notice. No objection to the preceding is presented. The court confirms with Mr. Lee that the proposed Successor Trustee is an attorney at his firm and he believes that there is no conflict of interest.

After additional discussion, all matters are continued to Jun-12-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods/Ateesh Datt. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Continued To Jun-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-10-2023 Continued To Jun-12-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Beneficiary'S Petition To Remove The Trustee And Order Instructions Pursuant To Probate Code 17200
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Continued To Apr-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jong Lee appeared by zoom for Chong Tai Kim (petitioner).

Mr. Lee stated that he has had no communication with Kyung Ja Kim, that he does not know if Kyung is represented by an attorney, that Kyung expressed that she does not want to communicate with him or his client, that they sent her a letter two-months ago, and that there was no response. Mr. Lee also stated that his client would be willing to appoint a private fiduciary. The court suspends trustee Kyung Ja Kim today, and will issue an order to show cause re removal of trustee for Kyung Ja Kim to appear on April 10, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why she should not be removed. The Petition to Remove the Trustee, etc. is continued to April 10, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The trustee is to provide any written responses before March 29, 2023. If Mr. Lee wants to file a petition to appoint a successor trustee, it can be given a hearing date of April 10, 2023 as approved by the Judicial Officer.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

Beneficiary'S Petition To Remove The Trustee And Order Instructions Pursuant To Probate Code 17200
Off Calendar Dec-12-2022 Continued To Feb-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jong K. Lee, via Zoom, for Chong T. Kin, Petitioner.

Counsel confirms that his petition was denied without prejudice by the Los Angeles Court for lack of venue. The court questions counsel regarding whether this is the correct venue. Counsel offers advocacy for this being the correct venue for this matter. The court advises counsel that it is not convinced that Ms. Kim breached her fiduciary duties and that it will require proof of the preceding. The court and counsel discuss the notice issue with counsel reporting that he has not been able to communicate with Ms. Kim. Mr. Lee asks that the court review his response filed in July of this year in support of the court granting the instant petition. The court reiterates its position regarding requiring additional filing of proof pursuant to probate code 17200 (b)(7)(b) and notice pursuant to probate code 17203.

The matter is continued to Feb-27-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

Beneficiary'S Petition To Remove The Trustee And Order Instructions Pursuant To Probate Code 17200
Off Calendar Oct-31-2022 Continued To Dec-12-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Beneficiary'S Petition To Remove The Trustee And Order Instructions Pursuant To Probate Code 17200
Off Calendar Sep-19-2022 Continued To Oct-31-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Beneficiary'S Petition To Remove The Trustee And Order Instructions Pursuant To Probate Code 17200
Off Calendar Aug-01-2022 Continued To Sep-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jong K. Lee, via Zoom, for Chong Tai Kim, Petitioner.

The court confirms with counsel that Kyung Ju Kim and Kyung Ja Kim are the same person. The court and counsel discuss two threshold issues in this matter regarding whether San Francisco is the proper venue in this matter and two, notice is at issue. Counsel reports that petitioner lives in a duplex in San Francisco and that he has sent notice via certified mail which were signed. The court advises that it requires a better showing in support of the principal location of administration and of notice in accordance with probate code 17203(b), via verified documents formally filed with the court. Counsel is advised that the court is willing to grant a continuance to allow counsel to comply with the preceding.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Sep-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is reminded that as of Aug-22-2022, the Zoom meeting information that he is required to serve, will be updated, and refers him to the most recent Order of the Probate and Mental Health Division to obtain that information accordingly.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
